embeddingText: Webbplatsstruktur för tillverkare inom andra icke-metalliska mineraliska produkter: produkter, produktkategorier, material, tillverkning, kapacitet, leverans, offertförfrågan, fabrik, anläggning, kontakt, referenser, teknisk dialog.
llmClassificationHints: Use this scaffold when the business manufactures or processes products such as glass, ceramics, concrete, cement, gypsum, stone or related mineral-based goods.
Prefer this scaffold when visitors need to evaluate product range and production capability before contacting the company.
Do not choose this scaffold for pure installers, retailers or consultants unless manufacturing is the primary business.
